title: The Hour Before the World Wakes Up
caption:
There is an hour before the notifications, before anyone needs anything, before the day claims you. Most men sleep through it.

The ones who don't build something the others never catch up to.

Not because mornings are magic. Because what you do before the world asks anything of you shapes who you are when everything is on the line. The gym will be there at noon. The hour before it all starts, where God and your Bible are the only voices. That one has to be chosen.

"Evening and morning and at noon I cry out." Psalm 55:17.

Which morning this week could you give that hour? Save this and pick one tonight.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #morningroutine #scripture #thework
